narrative:
Norwich Township has 29,420 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
